flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Tillamook Bay Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.4k → $4.9k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Tillamook Bay Community College rose 11% between 2015 and 2018 ($9.5k → $10.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Tillamook Bay Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.1k → $5.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Tillamook Bay Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5% → 0.0%).
